OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ClinicianGetManualOnboardingDetailsIP

childElements.name: DE_GETHPF
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "contactId" : "=%DRE_ClinicianAndContract:clinicianAccountDetails:PersonContactId%", "facilityType" : "Facility" }, "additionalOutput" : { "allHPFRecords" : "=LIST(%DE_GETHPF:hpfList%)", "caseList" : "=LIST(%DE_GETHPF:csList%)", "onboardingCaseRecordTypeId" : "=%DE_GETHPF:onboardingCaseRecordTypeId%", "SCPCasePresent" : "%DE_GETHPF:SCPCasePresent%" }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "GETHPFAndOnboardingCaseDM", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRE_ClinicianAndContract
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "recordId" : "=%ContextId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "GETClinicianAndContractDetailsDM", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LA_HPFRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : true, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "listKey" : "DE_GETHPF:allHPFRecords", "matchingPath" : "hpfRecordId", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "listKey" : "DE_GETHPF:caseList", "matchingPath" : "csHPFId", "normalizeKey" : "1" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ null ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "DE_GETHPF:allHPFRecords", "DE_GETHPF:caseList" ], "filterListFormula" : "=hpfRecordId <> csHPFId", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { "priority" : "Medium", "selectRecord" : false }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }
